title: Crispy Bean Tacos
description: A flavorful and crunchy taco recipe using crispy mexican ingredients and bean stew.
instructions: In a pan over medium heat, melt butter and mix with Mexican seasoning.
Add crispy onions to the pan and cook until lightly browned.
Warm the bean stew in a separate pan or in the microwave.
To assemble the tacos, place a spoonful of bean stew onto each crispy taco shell.
Top the stew with crispy onions and a sprinkle of salt and pepper.
Bake the tacos in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes until crispy.
